title: Mey #4314
definition:
Mezahab = "waters of gold"

 1) father of Matred and grandfather of Mehetabel, the wife of Hadad,
    the last named king of Edom
nasbUsage:
Definition: Mezahab = "waters of gold"

 1) father of Matred and grandfather of Mehetabel, the wife of Hadad,
    the last named king of Edom

    NASB:  an Edomite
